familySummaries.title: Dynamic Graveyard Mana-Value Reanimation
familySummaries.notes: High-yield follow-up to the new static mana-value cap support; keep runtime-dependent caps explicit and conservative.

familySummaries.title: Counter-Bearing Graveyard Reanimation
familySummaries.notes: Extends the current with-counters support to more real-card variants, especially where extra legality or follow-up state matters.

familySummaries.title: Exact-Target Reanimation Under Your Control
familySummaries.notes: Broadens the exact-target graveyard move family with remaining qualifiers, riders, and follow-up text.

familySummaries.title: Exact-Target Reanimation Under Owner Control
familySummaries.notes: Small but important owner-control corner for deterministic reanimation.

familySummaries.title: Exact-Target Graveyard To Hand
familySummaries.notes: Useful parity family for real recursion spells that still need variant coverage and corpus locks.

familySummaries.title: Exact-Target Graveyard To Library
familySummaries.notes: Covers top/bottom placement variants that reuse current exact-target graveyard selectors.

familySummaries.title: Exact-Target Graveyard Exile
familySummaries.notes: Large real-card family that benefits from variant locks and remaining qualifier coverage.

familySummaries.title: Your Graveyard To Hand
familySummaries.notes: High-volume self-recursion family; good for tightening direct target binding and context-driven return paths.

familySummaries.title: Dies Triggers Returning The Card To Battlefield
familySummaries.notes: Needs stronger antecedent binding from the dying object into the follow-up move-zone action.

familySummaries.title: Dies Triggers Returning The Card To Hand
familySummaries.notes: Similar contextual binding seam, but with hand destination instead of battlefield.

familySummaries.title: Pay-To-Return Deathmantle-Style Recursion
familySummaries.notes: Includes Nim Deathmantle-style payment + return + attachment bundles.

familySummaries.title: Entered Or Cast From Graveyard Checks
familySummaries.notes: Good follow-up once provenance is threaded more broadly across server and rules-engine paths.

familySummaries.title: Leave-Battlefield Exile Replacement Riders
familySummaries.notes: Important support glue for temporary recursion families such as unearth and similar reanimation effects.

familySummaries.title: Cast From Graveyard Permission Windows
familySummaries.notes: Useful for later test runs because these create lots of visible automation gaps when not modeled cleanly.

familySummaries.title: Play From Graveyard Permission Windows
familySummaries.notes: Covers lands and mixed play-permission text from graveyard.

familySummaries.title: Flashback Cards
familySummaries.notes: Stable, populous graveyard-casting family to validate once permission windows and replacement text are tightened.

familySummaries.title: Unearth Cards
familySummaries.notes: Pairs graveyard reanimation with the leave-battlefield exile replacement rider.

familySummaries.title: Escape And Similar Graveyard Alternate Costs
familySummaries.notes: Includes escape-style casting/replay from graveyard with additional costs or modifiers.
